name: Frosted Chocolate Drops
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugars together until creamy.
2. Blend in egg and melted chocolate.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour cream and milk. Stir in oats.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 10 to 12 minutes; cool.
For frosting:
1. Combine all frosting ingredients. Beat until smooth and of spreading consistency.
2. Frost the cooled cookies.
3. Top each cookie with a pecan half.
